A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or transaction signatures if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14.2)
- **Rust version**: (output of `rustc --version`)
- **Node.js version**: (output of `node --version`)
- **Solana CLI version**: (output of `solana --version`)
- **Anchor version**: (output of `anchor --version`)
- **KIRITE version/commit**: (git commit hash or release version)
- **Network**: (mainnet-beta / devnet / localnet)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or relevant information.

## Possible Fix

If you have an idea of what might be causing this, describe it here.
